description:
Two parallel mutagen efficacy studies on Phoenix/Ecto apps (atlas, builder)
independently discovered the same bug:

When `mix mutagen` runs via the global archive install (wrd.40), it does not
start the consumer project's OTP application before running tests. Currently
`ensure_runtime/0` only calls `Application.ensure_all_started(:mutagen_ex)`.

This breaks any test that requires:
- `Atlas.Repo` / `Builder.Repo` running (Ecto Sandbox checkout)
- `Mox.Server` (`import Mox`)
- `Phoenix.PubSub` (broadcast/subscribe)
- Supervised GenServers (`Builder.TraceStore`, atlas stream workers)

**Impact:**
- builder: 6 of 14 candidate tickets aborted at baseline; ~76% of builder's
  test surface is currently unreachable to mutagen.
- atlas: worked around with a 12-line `Mix.Tasks.MutagenApp` shim that calls
  `Mix.Task.run("app.start")` before delegating to `mutagen`. Also has to call
  `Mix.Local.append_archives()` between the two because `app.start` clears
  the archive search path.

Structurally the same shape as wrd.40: runtime preamble assumes more host
state than is actually present. The wrd.40 fix taught the preamble to find
its OWN ebin; this ticket should teach it to start the consumer project's app.

## Proposed fix

- After `Mix.Task.run("compile")` in `ensure_runtime/0`, call
  `Mix.Task.run("app.start")`.
- If `app.start` clears the archive code path, follow it with
  `Mix.Local.append_archives()` to re-add.
- Add an opt-out flag (`--no-host-app` or env var) for libraries that
  explicitly want a minimal boot — the mutagen_ex self-test sandbox uses the
  minimal boot, so the opt-out matters.

## Evidence

- Atlas study: ~/Documents/my-vault/LLMs/reports/atlas/2026-05-18-efficacy-study.md
  (Finding 1 in TL;DR, Method §4 — the MutagenApp shim is at
  /Users/mz/dev/mz/atlas-mutagen-study/lib/mix/tasks/mutagen_app.ex)
- Builder study: ~/Documents/my-vault/LLMs/reports/builder/2026-05-18-efficacy-study.md
  (TL;DR, Method §6 — 6/14 baseline aborts documented)
- Cross-project synthesis: ~/Documents/my-vault/LLMs/reports/mutagen_ex/2026-05-18-cross-project-synthesis.md
  (Finding 3 — flagged as the highest-leverage adoption blocker)

## Acceptance

- `mix mutagen --scope <lib_file> --tests <test_file>` runs cleanly against
  a Phoenix/Ecto project with `DataCase`/`ConnCase`/Mox/PubSub tests.
- Integration test in the wrd.40 style: a `archive_install_phoenix_test.exs`
  that spins up a minimal Phoenix project, installs the archive, and runs
  mutagen against a Repo-backed module.
- Opt-out path verified by re-running the mutagen_ex self-mutation Lab
  sandbox (which must continue to work with the minimal boot).
title: Runtime preamble: start host OTP application before tests in archive-install mode
